reviews.review_title: No longer launches and not available
reviews.review_description: Not sure what's going on there but the game will not launch. Just says it can't connect and their Discord seems dead. If you don't have the game already, there is no download option anymore so not sure what happened. Shame as this was a pretty fun game.

They make it look like a drum game but the hammer mode is the main focus.  It's fun and immersive and challenging and addictive with many genres of music.  
I wish the drum mode got as much attention.  It's good too but theres no difficulty selection like hammer mode.  Also the framerates in both modes is a bit low compared to the PC version.  If they can get it to 120fps the game would be even better.

reviews.review_title: Great simple and fun enjoyable game 🥰🖖
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this VR game.  I enjoyed playing it because it is easy to play and challenge at same time.
Please continue to add more gameplay and new environments , new outdoor colorful location with tree, flowers,  birds, dogs  and cats too if possible.   Keep up the good work.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your suggestion  :), We will add more music, scenes and skins in subsequent versions，Please continue to follow us ，share your feelings and get the latest information in our social platform.

Discord：
https://discord.gg/uHgPx7QaPx

Facebook：
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090999653895

We also welcome you to send emails directly to us to reflect your questions and feelings.

Email：drumlegend2023@gmail.com

Thank you！

reviews.review_description: The game concept is great but the content and tracks are not that good. If more and better songs will get into the game It will be better. Also make the songs harder because the sing are all way to easy.

reviews.review_description: This game has two drumming modes, The drum mode on the right can simulate playing the drums, and the songs are also very cool. It is very exciting to play. The rhythm mode on the left tests hand speed and reaction, and you can exercise while playing the drums.  I like it very much!
I can’t even play when I press something it doesn’t do anything I only stay in the main menu this game is overrated

developer_response.body: Hi jgunter5, we are very sorry for this problem. We take this issue very seriously and could you tell us more details through our discord, https://discord.gg/uHgPx7QaPx, or contact us through email, drumlegend2023@ gmail.com, thank you very much !
Thank you UngaBunga42, we are making more songs, welcome to join our discord: https://discord.gg/uHgPx7QaPx and talk about your favorite singers and song styles

reviews.review_description: The game supports the custom songs now. I downloaded some maps shared by other players in discord. All are my favorite songs. It is very enjoyable to play. I hope to launch a multiplayer online mode in the future！！！

reviews.review_title: Stopped working in the last month
reviews.review_description: I loved this game! Unfortunately sometime in the last month (not sure if it was a recent update) it stopped working. Won't even get to the menu. Right at launch it says there is a connection error and to try again. Keeps doing it no matter how many times I try. Uninstalled it and reinstalled it, same thing. All other games on my Quest 2 play just fine, multiplayer or single player they work. Is this a server issue on the dev's end??

Fun game, gets me moving. Want more 
For some reason, drums are not very loud on my end. Is it by design or something is wrong with my set?

developer_response.body:
Hello W, thank you for your reply. Regarding the problem of low drum sound, you can adjust the drum volume in the second column of the volume menu in options. If you still feel the drums volume is small, you can turn down the song and the UI volume, and then turn up the system volume of the meta quest2 device, I hope it can help you. 

Welcome follow our social platforms and share your feelings and suggestions:

Discord：
https://discord.gg/uHgPx7QaPx

Facebook：
https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100090999653895

We also welcome you to send emails directly to us to reflect your questions and feelings.

Email：drumlegend2023@gmail.com

Thank you！

reviews.review_description: I thoroughly enjoyed playing this. I liked it a lot better than Ragnarok. Definitely will put this in my rotation of rhythm games like Beat Saber and Synth Riders. Can't wait for even more songs. I recommend this game. It worked my arms! :)
